args.text: checkout-staging v9.2.0 deployed and verified. Smoke checklist passed: version check, basket totals, payment-intent retry flow.
checkout-eu v9.2.0 deployed and verified. Smoke checklist passed: version check, basket totals, payment-intent retry flow.
checkout-us v9.2.0 deployed and verified. Smoke checklist passed: version check, basket totals, payment-intent retry flow.

args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body:
Checkout v9.2.0 has been successfully rolled out across all environments.

Deployments completed:
- checkout-staging: verified (NOTE-RR-1)
- checkout-eu: verified (NOTE-RR-2)
- checkout-us: verified (NOTE-RR-3)

Key changes in v9.2.0:
- New payment-intent retry flow
- Basket price recalculation fix
- Removal of the legacy voucher endpoint

All smoke checklist items passed in each environment.

args.comment: All three environments deployed and verified. Rollout complete email sent.
